what_it_does: Defines an Overview React component that renders header actions, system count stats, canvas navigation tiles, and a recent activity list for the ConceptV design system UI.
observations: The component builds local stats and canvases arrays from props and static metadata.
Header actions call onSearch, onReset, onExport, and onNav('build').
Stat cards and canvas tiles use onNav to route to named sections.
Recent activity rows render icon, text, author/byline, and time from recentActivity items.
The component is assigned to window.Overview instead of being exported with module syntax.
standouts: Combines dashboard metrics, section navigation, and activity history in one overview screen.
Uses icon metadata consistently across stat cards, canvas tiles, and activity rows.
Includes quick actions for search, reset, export, and build from the header.
conventions: Uses dsa-* class names for layout and component styling.
Uses CvIcon and ViShape for visual symbols.
Defines render data arrays inside the component before JSX.
Uses inline styles for small badge and activity icon color details.
Uses global window assignment for component exposure.
concerns: Clickable div elements are used for stat cards and canvas tiles without visible keyboard handlers or button semantics.
The live timestamp text is hard-coded as 'last updated 1m ago'.
The component assumes counts and recentActivity contain the expected fields without local defaults or guards.
Several visual details are embedded as inline styles rather than class-based styling.
notes: This file is the overview dashboard surface tying system counts, navigation canvases, recent edits, and utility actions together.
questions: Should the 'Live · last updated 1m ago' label be driven by actual update state?
Are stat cards and canvas tiles expected to be accessible as keyboard-operable controls?
What fallback should render if counts or recentActivity are missing or empty?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose, 'system health dashboard', matches the rendered overview of system counts, navigation areas, recent activity, and maintenance actions.
intention_signals: It appears intended to give users a central landing canvas where they can assess design system inventory, jump into asset areas, search, export, reset session edits, or start a build workflow.
novelty: The file blends design-system asset counts, canvas navigation, and activity history into a compact dashboard component exposed through a global component registry pattern.
contribution: Contributes a neutral overview layer that preserves system inventory metrics, canvas entry points, recent activity context, and top-level utility actions for a fused design-system interface.
summary_for_embedding: Overview.jsx defines a global React overview dashboard for ConceptV with count-based stat cards, canvas navigation tiles, header utility actions, and recent activity rows.
intention_for_embedding: This component was for presenting the design system's current state and primary navigation/actions in one at-a-glance canvas.

symbols.does: Renders the ConceptV overview dashboard from counts, activity data, and action callbacks.
symbols.description: Overview constructs local stat and canvas metadata, then renders a CanvasHeader plus three dashboard sections: system stats, canvas tiles, and recent activity. It delegates navigation and utility behavior through callback props and exposes itself as window.Overview.
